summary: Targeted retest of mobile UX fixes at 390px viewport. All 4 checks PASS. Portal header overflow fixed, portal-header-userinfo hidden on mobile, SYSTEM_STATUS_MONITOR strip still visible, and all G0-1 through G0-6 accordion labels display on a single line with whiteSpace:nowrap applied.

portal_header_userinfo_hidden.detail: portal-header-userinfo found in DOM with display:none at 390px

system_status_monitor_visible.detail: SYSTEM_STATUS_MONITOR text still present on page

accordion_labels_single_line.detail: G0-1 through G0-6 all height=25.1px == lineHeight=25.1px, whiteSpace:nowrap applied

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both mobile UX fixes verified at 390px. Portal header overflow fix (portal-header-userinfo display:none @media max-width:768px) and accordion label whiteSpace:nowrap fix both working correctly.
